zh.lifeSummary: 當John de Babington III於1304年出生在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾易亞斯特 布利其福德時，他的父親Sir Bernard de Babington38歲，母親Mrs. Bernard Babington25歲。他於1333年與Alice de Bois在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1355年在法國布列塔尼分尼斯艾莫萊可享年51歲，埋葬在法國布列塔尼莫萊可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John de Babington III于1304年出生在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾易亞斯特 布利其福德时，他的父亲Sir Bernard de Babington38岁，母亲Mrs. Bernard Babington25岁。他于1333年与Alice de Bois在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1355年在法国布列塔尼分尼斯艾莫萊可享年51岁，埋葬在法国布列塔尼莫萊可。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Babington
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name for someone from Babington in Somerset or Great or Little Bavington in Northumberland, which is recorded as Babington until the early 18th century. Both are named with the Old English personal name Babba (see Babb ) + the connective particle -ing- ‘associated with, named after’ + tūn ‘settlement’. The name may also be derived from Bebington in Cheshire (see 2 below) or Bevington in Warwickshire (see Bevington , which has sometimes been altered in spelling by association with Babington).

English (Cheshire and Lancashire): variant of Bebbington, a habitational name from Bebington in Cheshire, from the Old English personal name Bebba + the connective particle -ing- ‘associated with, named after’ + tūn ‘settlement’. The alteration to Bavington and Bevington shows a common development of -b- to -v- in placenames and surnames.

variants.name: Babb
meanings: English (Devon, Somerset, and Cornwall): from the Middle English personal name Babb(e), usually no doubt a pet form of the female personal name Barbara (see Barbara ), but possibly in some cases a survival of the Old English personal name Babba, which is found in several placenames, including Babbacombe in Devon and Babington in Somerset.
English (Devon, Somerset, and Cornwall): from Middle English babe ‘infant, young child’, applied as a nickname.
Americanized form of German   Bobb   or of some other similar (like-sounding) surname.

variants.name: Bevington
meanings: (southwest Midlands): habitational name from either of two places, in Warwickshire and Gloucestershire, named Bevington, from the Old English personal name Bēofa + Old English -ing- implying association + tūn ‘settlement’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When John de Babington III was born in 1304, in East Bridgford, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Bernard de Babington, was 38 and his mother, Mrs. Bernard Babington, was 25. He married Alice de Bois in 1333, in Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1355, in Morlaix, Finistère, Brittany, France, at the age of 51, and was buried in Morlaix, Brittany, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John de Babington III est né en 1304, à East Bridgford, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Bernard de Babington, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Bernard Babington, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Alice de Bois en 1333, à Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1355, à Morlaix, Finistère, Bretagne, France, à l’âge de 51 ans, et a été enterré à Morlaix, Bretagne, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als John de Babington III 1304 in East Bridgford, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Bernard de Babington 38 und seine Mutter Mrs. Bernard Babington 25. Er hat 1333 in Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom Alice de Bois geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1355 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Morlaix, Finistère, Bretagne, Frankreich und wurde in Morlaix, Bretagne, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John de Babington III è nato il nel 1304 nel East Bridgford, Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Bernard de Babington, aveva 38 anni e il suo madre, Mrs. Bernard Babington, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Alice de Bois nel 1333, nel Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1355, nel Morlaix, Finistère, Bretagne, Francia, all'età di 51 anni, e fu sepolto a Morlaix, Bretagne, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: John de Babington IIIが1304年にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアエアスト ブリドグフォードで生まれた時，父Sir Bernard de Babingtonは38歳，母Mrs. Bernard Babingtonは25歳であった。1333年にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアでAlice de Boisと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1355年にフランスブレタグンフィニストeアモーレイックスで51歳で死去し，フランスブレタグンモーレイックスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John de Babington III(이)가 1304년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 이스트 브리지퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Bernard de Babington(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. Bernard Babington(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1333년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르에서 Alice de Bois(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1355년 프랑스 브레타그니 핑니스트e르 모를레이스에서 51세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 브레타그니 모를레이스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John de Babington III nasceu em 1304, em East Bridgford, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Bernard de Babington, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Bernard Babington, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice de Bois em 1333, em Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1355, em Morlaix, Finistère, Bretagne, França, com 51 anos, e foi sepultado em Morlaix, Bretagne, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John de Babington III родился в 1304 г. в местности эаст бриджфорд, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Bernard de Babington было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Bernard Babington, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice de Bois в 1333 г. в местности ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1355 г. в местности морлеикс, финистeр, бретагн, Франция в возрасте 51 год и был похоронен в местности морлеикс, бретагн, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John de Babington III nació en 1304, en East Bridgford, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Bernard de Babington, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Mrs. Bernard Babington, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Alice de Bois en 1333, en Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1355, en Morlaix, Finistère, Bretagne, Francia, a la edad de 51 años, y fue sepultado en Morlaix, Bretagne, Francia.
